title: MoreShulkerShells
description: Changes the Shulker loot table to the one from Bedrock Edition so Shulkers drop more Shulker Shells when killed with Looting.
body:
Changes the Shulker loot table to the one from Bedrock Edition so Shulkers drop more Shulker Shells when killed with Looting.

In Vanilla Minecraft Shulkers have a 50% chance of dropping a Shulker Shell, which is increased by 6.25% per level of the Looting enchant used. So with Looting III you have a 68.75% chance of getting a single Shulker Shell.

With this datapack the amount of Shulker Shells dropped is increased with Looting, so instead of having a bigger chance to get a single Shulker Shell you now actually get more Shulker Shells. With each Looting enchant level it is increased by 1, so with Looting III you randomly get between 0 and 4 Shulker Shells.

The aim for this datapack is to make the grind to get a lot of Shulker Boxes a little bit easier.
